{{CargoRelic
|name=Ore Refinement Station
|class_id=20852
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=Revolutionary!
Faster ore processing
Doubles as a shelter (if your definition includes screaming into reinforced steel)
FDA-approved for creating workplace grievances
|fame=18
|art=16
|fth=14
|civ=13
|tech=29
|ss1=prop@56033_2<br>prop@56034_2
|ss2=prop@56033_2<br>prop@56034_2
|ss3=prop@56033_2<br>prop@56034_2
|ss4=prop@56033_2<br>prop@56034_2
|ss7=prop@56033_2<br>prop@56034_2<br> (Awakened)
}}
